---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**How to reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behaviour.

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Go version: [e.g. 1.21.13]
- Bot library version: [e.g. v5.5.1]

**Logs / screenshots**
If applicable, add logs or screenshots.
